79:20.english: He showed him the greatest sign.
79:20.score_notes: Tiny — 4 words. Musa showed Pharaoh the greatest miracle. Juz' 30.

lesson_use.heading: 5 · كُبْرَى (greatest)
lesson_use.english: And he showed him the **greatest** sign
lesson_use.notes: Mūsā showed Pharaoh something so overwhelming that this root had to be used — *the greatest*.
